raw_consumer_statement: Back on XX/XX/23 my credit card was used for about a week multiple times for unknown user and unauthorized. Took the credit cards company about a week to realize that the use on my card was suspicious. After two months of investigation they came up with I was responsible for those transactions because my card was used at the time of the transaction. My card maybe cloned because I didnt do does transactions. I requested to speak with a supervisor an its been a month and I still waiting, I filed a police report and the credit card company its getting back to me with that information. I have been trying to get in touch with the person investigating unsuccessfully despite my multiple tries.
